ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "card_type" INTEGER /* Type of card (e.g., Monster, Spell, Trap) */,
  "rarity" INTEGER /* Rarity of the card (e.g., N, R, UR) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the card */,
  "need" INTEGER /* Number of cards needed to complete a set */,
  "card_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the card */,
  "card_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the card image */,
  "card_effect" TEXT /* Effect or ability of the card */,
  "card_atk" INTEGER /* Attack points for monster cards */,
  "card_def" INTEGER /* Defense points for monster cards */,
  "card_level" INTEGER /* Level or rank of the card */,
  "card_attribute" TEXT /* Attribute of the card (e.g., Light, Dark) */,
  "card_race" TEXT /* Race of the card (e.g., Dragon, Fairy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_card_type FOREIGN KEY ("card_type") REFERENCES card_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_rarity FOREIGN KEY ("rarity") REFERENCES rarities ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarities" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the rarity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  "set_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the set image */,
  "set_price" REAL /* Price of the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_set_cards" (
  "set_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card in a set */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set the card belongs to */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "card_price" REAL /* Price of the card in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_set_cards_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES card_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_set_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the player logged in */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Player's rank or level */,
  "player_location" TEXT /* Player's location */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Player's bio or profile description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_cards" (
  "player_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card owned by a player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the card */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card owned by the player */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player acquired the card */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method by which the player acquired the card (e.g., purchase, trade, event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_cards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who created the deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "deck_description" TEXT /* Description of the deck */,
  "deck_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the deck was created */,
  "deck_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the deck was last updated */,
  "deck_type" TEXT /* Type of the deck (e.g., Aggro, Control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_cards" (
  "deck_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card in a deck */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck the card belongs to */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the deck */,
  "card_position" TEXT /* Position of the card in the deck (e.g., Main Deck, Side Deck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who initiated the trade */,
  "other_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the other player involved in the trade */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "trade_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., direct, auction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_other_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being tracked */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck being tracked */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., win rate, usage rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric being tracked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., game, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_deck_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., win rate, usage rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric being tracked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., game, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_deck_performance_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_deck_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., win rate, usage rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric being tracked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the popularity metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the popularity metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the popularity metric (e.g., game, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_popularity_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)
